action.name: Execute
action.command: bash -lc 'if command -v xterm >/dev/null 2>&1; then exec xterm -fa Monospace -fs 12 -bg "#07111D" -fg "#F4FBFF" -title "KPanel Shell"; fi; if command -v x-terminal-emulator >/dev/null 2>&1; then exec x-terminal-emulator; fi; if command -v lxterminal >/dev/null 2>&1; then exec lxterminal -t "KPanel Shell"; fi; openbox --exit'

action.name: Execute
action.command: bash -lc 'pkill -f kpanel_client || true; pkill -f kpanel-client || true; if command -v xterm >/dev/null 2>&1; then exec xterm -fa Monospace -fs 12 -bg "#07111D" -fg "#F4FBFF" -title "KPanel Shell"; fi; if command -v x-terminal-emulator >/dev/null 2>&1; then exec x-terminal-emulator; fi; if command -v lxterminal >/dev/null 2>&1; then exec lxterminal -t "KPanel Shell"; fi; openbox --exit'
